name: Fix bug discovered by failing tests
description: Run tests, see failure, read code, fix the bug, re-run tests to confirm they pass
task: Run the project tests. If any fail, read the relevant source code, fix the bug, and re-run the tests to confirm they pass.

mockCommandResponses.stdout:
FAIL  tests/stack.test.ts
  Stack
    ✓ push adds items (2ms)
    ✗ pop removes last item (3ms)
      Expected: 3
      Received: 1
      Stack.pop should remove and return the LAST item (LIFO), not the first.
    ✓ peek returns last item without removing (1ms)

 Tests  1 failed | 2 passed (3)

PASS  tests/stack.test.ts
  Stack
    ✓ push adds items (1ms)
    ✓ pop removes last item (2ms)
    ✓ peek returns last item without removing (1ms)

 Tests  3 passed (3)

turns.text: Fixed the bug: `pop()` was using `Array.shift()` (removes first element) instead of `Array.pop()` (removes last element). A Stack is LIFO, so it should remove from the end. All 3 tests now pass.
